Foxwell_ShipAmbush_VE_desc_001.en:
Care to help us ghost a bad guy? 

We’ve been hired to hunt down an outlaw flying a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>. Shouldn’t be too hard since they take the same flightpath each day. That makes them a prime target for an ambush if I ever saw one. I’ve analyzed the route and determined that <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> is the ideal spot to strike. There’s an emission cloud there that’ll be perfect to hide your ship’s signature while you wait.   

Job is simple if you’re interested. Head to the location, hide out, power down, and then wait for them to fly by. Sometimes they roll alone but they often have other single-seat ships with them. Shouldn’t be too hard to handle for a pro. Plus, we’ll still have reinforcements nearby and ready to deploy once it pops off.

Pull this off and we'll give the main contractor a bonus payment of <EM4>1 MG Scrip</EM4>.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_ShipAmbush_VE_desc_001.tr: 想不想幫我們伏擊一個惡徒?

Foxwell_EliminateAll_PAF_M_desc_001.en:
We’ve been tracking a group of outlaws who’ve been causing trouble for one of our clients. Seems they’ve taken up residence at an old Hathor facility. Don’t know what their plans with that old facility are but our client is eager to have them taken care of.

Looking for someone to go to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and neutralize these targets.

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_EliminateAll_PAF_M_desc_001.tr: 我們一直在追蹤一個犯罪團夥，他們一直在給我們的一位客戶製造麻煩。看來他們已經佔據了一個廢棄的哈索爾設施。雖然不清楚他們對這個設施有何打算，但我們的客戶非常希望這些人被清除。

Foxwell_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Des.en:
There's a small group of criminals that have been marking their territory, striking out any freighters that get close enough. They got a little too greedy though, because now someone's paying us to go deal with them.

Once you and whoever you're bringing are ready, go to [LOCATION] and engage with these criminals. Since they like to fly in separate packs, be sure you wait around to clear every last one of them out.
 
Good luck,

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Des.tr: 有一小群罪犯一直在劃分地盤，襲擊任何靠近的貨船。不過他們有點太貪心了，因為現在有人出錢讓我們去對付他們。

Foxwell_DefendLocation_E_Desc_001.en:
Ships coming and going from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> are being targeted by hostile forces. The folks there have hired us to deal with this problem immediately.

Need someone to get there pronto and start fighting off these ships. The situation appears to be constantly evolving, so I’ll keep you updated on where you’re needed most. 

For the hustle and effort, we’ll also be paying a bonus of <EM4>3 MG Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor for dealing with this.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_DefendLocation_E_Desc_001.tr: 從 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 出入的太空船正遭到敵對勢力的攻擊。當地人已僱傭我們立即處理這個問題。

Foxwell_bombingrun_E_desc_001.en:
We've just received the location of an outlaw outpost where some up-and-coming criminals have been hanging out. Now, our client says there's no reason to engage these folks directly. Instead you will be targeting their supply lines.

Fly on over to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and take out their fuel stores while dealing with any minimal resistance they may put up. It will be your call on how much you engage with the hostile forces, just don't forget that your main objective is ensuring those fuel tanks are out of action.

This is a yellow level contract so pay will be proportionate.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_bombingrun_E_desc_001.tr: 我們剛剛收到了法外之徒前哨站的位置，那裡是一些新興罪犯的出沒地。我們的客戶說沒必要直接與這些人交戰。相反地，您將針對他們的供應線進行打擊。

Foxwell_bombingrun_VE_desc_001.en:
A bunch of outlaws have been harassing our client and recently things have taken a turn for the worse. They've taken over their property and we've exhausted all other options.

We need a decent pilot to head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and take out their fuel tanks. If you can cut off their supplies, you can pave the way for the client to take back their property.

This shouldn't be a tough one. You might run into a ship or two and maybe a few turrets, but you've been authorized to use lethal force. All we need for you to do is get in there, get the fuel tanks, and get out.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_bombingrun_VE_desc_001.tr: 一群法外之徒一直在騷擾我們的客戶，最近情況急轉直下。他們佔領了客戶的財產，而我們已經用盡了所有其他手段。

Foxwell_EliminateAll_OLP_M_desc_001.en:
We’ve been following a group of outlaws on behalf of a client, and it looks like they’ve taken a permanent pit stop on an old orbital platform. 

We’re looking for a contractor who can head over to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and neutralize the targets. The platform is crawling with a bunch of armed and dangerous thugs, so we’ve designated this a yellow level contract.

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_EliminateAll_OLP_M_desc_001.tr: 我們受客戶委託追蹤一組不法分子，看來他們已在一個舊軌道平臺永久停泊。

Foxwell_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Des.en:
Okay, this might be a bit of stretch to do on your own, so if you got any favors to call in, it could be good to cash those chits now. There's a group of desperados striking delivery ships up and down this sector and we've been tasked with cleaning them up. 

Once your crew is ready, head over to [LOCATION] and take the hostiles there down. Now, these bastards are a bit clever so they tend to split up into smaller packs. Make sure you wait around to clear every last one of them out.
 
Good luck,

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives."
Foxwell_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Des.tr: 聽著，這活單挑可能有點吃力，所以如果你有什麼交情可以動用，現在就是兌現那些人情債的好時機。有一群亡命之徒在這個區域不停襲擊貨船，我們被委派去清理他們。

Foxwell_SecurityPatrol_VE_Desc_001.en:
Time to knock out a routine patrol for one of our long-term clients. The route is a series of waypoints that need to be visited and scanned to confirm everything’s as expected. Should be simple enough.  

If interested, please accept and head to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD to start. Pull this off and the main contractor will get a bonus payment of <EM4>2 MG Scrip.</EM4>

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_SecurityPatrol_VE_Desc_001.tr: 是時候為我們的一位長期客戶執行一次例行巡邏了。任務路徑是一系列需要訪問並掃描的航點，以確認一切如預期。應該不算太難。

Foxwell_SecurityPatrol_E_Desc_001.en:
Need someone to knock out a security patrol. You’ll need to go to the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD and then scan several designated waypoints ensuring that they’re safe and secure. 

Satellites in that region have been acting up recently. Not exactly sure what’s going on out there, but best be prepared in case there’s any trouble.

Complete this contract and the main contractor will get a bonus payment of <EM4>4 MG Scrip.</EM4>

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_SecurityPatrol_E_Desc_001.tr: 我們需要有人來處理一次保全巡邏。你需要前往 HUD 上的<EM4>位置標記點</EM4>，並掃描幾個指定的航點，確保這些區域的安全與穩定。

foxwell_DefendShip_E_desc_001.en:
Foxwell is looking for an available combat pilot to provide immediate assistance to a [SHIP] under attack over by [LOCATION]. We have not identified the perpetrators in the attack, but have been assured it is a small force.

Please dispatch quickly and clear out all hostiles. We need the client to make it through this as they haven't paid us yet.

Good luck,

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
foxwell_DefendShip_E_desc_001.tr: 福克斯爾正在尋找一名即刻提供支援的戰鬥飛行員，前往[LOCATION]處協助一艘遭受攻擊的[SHIP]。目前尚未確定攻擊者身份，但據悉對方只是一支小型武裝力量。

Foxwell_DefendLocation_VE_Desc_001.en:
Outlaw ships are harassing anyone attempting to land or leave our client’s operations at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Need someone to fly there to defend the site and protect our client’s ships before the situation gets out of control. Get there, get after those aggressors, and I'll keep you updated on the situation. 

Help take care of this and we'll pass along a bonus payment of <EM4>2 MG Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_DefendLocation_VE_Desc_001.tr: 不法分子的艦船正在騷擾任何試圖在<EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>著陸或離開我們客戶操作的人。我們需要有人飛往該地，保護我們客戶的艦船，以防情況失控。趕快行動，對付那些侵略者，我會隨時向你更新情況。

Foxwell_ShipAmbush_E_desc_001.en:
An outlaw who’s been on the run finally returned to the system. Seems like they hoped that disappearing for a bit would make us forget about them. They’re not even trying to hide their identity or vary their routine which means we know exactly where they’re going to be.

Latest intel indicates that they’re flying a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and will be passing by <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> soon. I’ve already scoped out an emission cloud that’s a perfect place for you to find cover, power down your ship, and wait. Only real variable is if they’ll be alone or not. We’ve heard they sometimes roll with friends that all fly single-seaters. Landing that first surprise strike will be important as this crew is battle-tested, but we’ll have reinforcements at the ready to provide support if you need them.

Get this done and we'll give the main contractor a bonus payment of <EM4>3 MG Scrip</EM4>.

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_ShipAmbush_E_desc_001.tr: 一個逃犯終於回到這個星系了。看來他以為消失一段時間就能讓我們忘記他。他甚至沒有試圖隱藏身份或改變作息，這意味著我們已經知道他要去哪裡了。

Foxwell_DefendDestructibleEntites_VE_Des.en:
Calling all pilots – one of our clients is looking for some protection for their <EM4>[OBJECTS]</EM4>, based in <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. From what we’ve gathered, the attackers are a group of wannabe outlaw pests who probably haven’t realized the value of the assets they’re trying to destroy, just wreaking havoc for the sake of it. Still, the client’s property is important, so should be kept as intact as possible.

If you take care of them to the Foxwell standards, we’re offering <EM4>2 MG Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor. 

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_DefendDestructibleEntites_VE_Des.tr: 呼叫所有飛行員——我們的一位客戶正尋求保護，目標是他們位於 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 的 <EM4>[OBJECTS]</EM4>。根據我們收集到的情報，襲擊者是一群妄想成為不法分子的害蟲，他們大概根本不知道自己試圖摧毀的資產有多大的價值，只是為了破壞而破壞。儘管如此，客戶的財產非常重要，所以應該盡可能保持完整。

Foxwell_DefendEntitesAndEscort_VE_Desc.en:
For any pilots in the area – a group of bandits is targeting one of our clients at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, specifically their <EM4>[OBJECTS]</EM4> and the maintenance ships that manage them. From our intel, it's only a few outlaws trying to make some quick credits, but they're also the type to cause some real damage if you get in their way.

If you take care of them and relocate the client's ship and crew safely, we’re offering <EM4>2 MG Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor. 

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_DefendEntitesAndEscort_VE_Desc.tr: 區域內的各位駕駛員請注意——一群強盜正在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 針對我們的一位客戶，特別是他們的 <EM4>[OBJECTS]</EM4> 與負責維護的艦船。根據情報，這只是幾名想賺快錢的不法分子，但如果您擋了他們的路，他們也絕對能造成嚴重的破壞。

Foxwell_DefendDestructibleEntites_E_Desc.en:
Any willing pilots in the area? Need some protection around <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> for a client. A band of outlaws has been targeting their <EM4>[OBJECTS]</EM4>, and if nothing's done about it they'll do some real damage. Need someone to protect the client’s property as much as possible and deal with the thugs.

From the intel we’ve managed to gather, these thugs are small-time but can cause some pain if you’re not careful. So, if you manage to nail this to the Foxwell standards, we’re offering <EM4>3 MG Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor. 

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_DefendDestructibleEntites_E_Desc.tr: 這片區域有哪位飛行員願意協助嗎？我們有個客戶在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 附近需要保護。一群歹徒一直針對他們的 <EM4>[OBJECTS]</EM4> 發動襲擊，如果不採取行動，他們將會造成嚴重的破壞。我們需要有人盡可能地保護客戶的財產，並處理這些暴徒。

Foxwell_DefendEntitesAndEscort_E_Desc.en:
We need a contractor to provide convoy and protection services at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. One of our elite clients' are under attack from a band of outlaws targeting their <EM4>[OBJECTS] and ships</EM4>. You'll need to keep the crew safe as they traverse the area, as well as make sure the assets stay as intact. These thugs look like they can do some real damage, so be sure you engage them with caution or the client might not be the only one to take heavy losses.

If you manage to nail this to the Foxwell standards, we’re offering <EM4>3 MG Scrip</EM4> as compensation to the main contractor. 

Good luck,

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_DefendEntitesAndEscort_E_Desc.tr: 我們需要承包商在 <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> 提供護航與保護服務。我們的一位精英客戶正受到一夥不法分子的攻擊，目標是他們的 <EM4>[OBJECTS] 與艦船</EM4>。您需要在他們穿越該區域時保護船員安全，並確保資產完好無損。這些暴徒看起來能造成嚴重的破壞，所以請務必謹慎應對，否則客戶可能不是唯一遭受重大損失的人。

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_SlimyLMG.en: This gun has picture of amazing creature on side. Use it and it make you big and strong like Yormandi. Spit lightning. Bring my items and then you get it. Bye.
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_SlimyLMG.tr: 這把槍的側面刻有驚人的生物圖案。使用它，你會變得如同約曼迪一般強大。噴射雷電。帶來我的物品，然後你就能得到它。再見。

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_NoneAR.en: This rifle is very good at shooting, but could have nicer design. Wikelo fix. Looks very nice now. Give to you for trade. Bring me things, I give you rifle. Even give you blueprint if you need.
TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_NoneAR.tr: 這把步槍很會射擊，但外觀還能更好看。維克洛來修。現在好看多了。拿來跟你交換。把我要的東西帶來，我就把步槍給你。若你沒有，我連藍圖也給你。

TheCollector_Ships_ZeusCL_Desc.en: Wikelo can make new version of cargo Zeus ship. If you want, bring what needed, then you can have ship. Fair. Bye.
TheCollector_Ships_ZeusCL_Desc.tr: 維克洛可以製造新型貨運宙斯船。若有意願，帶來所需物品，即可獲得此船。公平交易。再見。

TheCollector_Ships_ZeusES_Desc.en: Wikelo can make new version of Zeus ship. I know it important ship to Human. Not sure why, but yes, very useful ship. Anyway, can upgrade and make a little prettier. What I need listed, if you want, bring. Bye.
TheCollector_Ships_ZeusES_Desc.tr: 維克洛可以製造新型宙斯艦。我知道這艘船對人類來說非常重要，雖然我不清楚原因，但確實非常實用。總之，我們可以升級並讓它更美觀。如果感興趣，請帶上所需的物品。掰。

Covalex_HaulCargo_AToB_Rehire_desc.en:
Hey,

Have a bit of good news for you. Covalex recently finished an evaluation of our contractor pool, and decided to reconsider your status as a cargo hauler. To requalify, all you need is to successfully complete the following delivery.

Pick up <EM4>Quartz</EM4> from a freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and deliver it to a freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. In order to complete this haul in a fast and efficient manner, you'll need a ship that can haul <EM4>1 SCU cargo containers</EM4>.

Hopefully everything goes smoothly so we can welcome you back to the team.

By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.   

Covalex Shipping  
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

Also, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along. 

Any chance you’re available to take care of it for us?

[SIGN_OFF]

Covalex_HaulCargo_MultiToSingle_Waste_Wa.en:
Hi,

Need the trash collected from a few Hurston locations and then taken to a freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Don't worry, none of the containers are bigger than <EM4>1 SCU</EM4>.

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

- Freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>
- Freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION1]</EM4>

Fun fact for you. Hurston is the only planet in Stanton that doesn’t separate their trash and scrap. One of their workers told me that the company did a cost-benefit analysis on it decades ago that determined it wasn’t worth putting a planet-wide system in place to facilitate it. Isn’t that the most Hurston thing ever?   

By the way, we strongly encourage contractors to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.   

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

assassin_danger_0006.en: As for gearing up for this little job, you shouldn't need anything out of the ordinary. ~mission(TargetName|Last) prefers to fly alone. I mean, for a real special occasion they might travel with a friend or two, but I'd be surprised.
assassin_danger_0006.tr: 關於這次任務的準備，你應該不需要任何特別的裝備。[TARGET] 偏好獨自行動。當然，在特別場合，他們可能會帶上一兩個同伴，但這讓我感到意外。

assassin_danger_0005.en: While you should be careful, cause you never know - my guess is that ~mission(TargetName|Last) is gonna drop easy. Poor sod chooses to fly solo and hardly ever bothers with anything more than a few escorts.
assassin_danger_0005.tr: 雖然你還是要小心，畢竟誰知道呢 - 我猜 [TARGET] 會比較簡單。這傢伙喜歡單獨行動，幾乎從不僱用護衛。

assassin_danger_0007.en: Apparently, there's a good chance this scav's not gonna be traveling alone either. Seems that their little multicrew ship hardly ever flies without at least one or two friends along for the trip.
assassin_danger_0007.tr: 顯然，這個拾荒者很可能不會單獨行動。他們的小型多乘員船似乎總是帶著一兩個同伴一同航行。

assassin_danger_0008.en: Word is that the small multicrew ship ~mission(TargetName|Last) captains is being guarded by a few hired escorts. Can't say for sure if it's true, but good to be careful just in case.
assassin_danger_0008.tr: 據聞由 [TARGET] 擔任艦長的那艘小型多船員飛船正由幾名僱傭護衛保護。雖然無法確定訊息是否屬實，但以防萬一，謹慎行事總是明智之舉。

assassin_danger_0010.en: Make sure to bring your full arsenal when you go hunting. Since ~mission(TargetName|Last) usually captains a bigger multicrew ship and springs the extra credits for escort, something tells me you might need the extra firepower.
assassin_danger_0010.tr: 出發狩獵時務必攜帶全部武器裝備。由於 [TARGET] 通常駕駛一艘大型多人艦，並額外收取護衛費，感覺你需要額外的火力支援。

assassin_danger_0009.en: Rumor has it that ~mission(TargetName|Last) typically travels with a full escort so be ready to hit hard. Even if you do get lucky and catch them alone, you'll still have their ship to deal with and supposedly they captain a bit of a beast.
assassin_danger_0009.tr: 據聞 [TARGET] 通常會帶全副武裝的護衛，因此要做好硬碰硬的準備。即便你運氣好，遇到他們單獨行動，仍需面對他們的艦船，據說那是一艘兇猛的戰艦。

Tutorial01_Area18_JournalToken.en: Currently, you are in Area 18, on ArcCorp, the third planet in the Stanton System – a great distance from Humanity’s origins in the Sol System. The four planets in the system are owned by megacorporations who each purchased a planet from the UEE and now govern their own region of space. They are: Hurston Dynamics, Crusader Industries, ArcCorp, and microTech. \n\n~mission(Location|Name) is the main commercial zone of the mega-city that sprawls across the surface of ArcCorp. From here, the tutorial will guide you to ~mission(Destination), the space station in orbit above the planet that can serve as your gateway to further exploration of the Stanton system.
Tutorial01_Area18_JournalToken.tr: 目前，你身處於斯坦頓星系第三顆行星「弧光星」上的 18 區——這裡距離人類起源的太陽系非常遙遠。該星系中的四顆行星皆由巨型企業擁有，這些企業分別從地球聯邦政府購得了行星，並治理著各自的太空區域。他們分別是：赫斯頓動力、十字軍工業、弧光集團以及微科。

Tutorial01_Lorville_JournalToken.en: Currently, you are in Lorville, on Hurston, the first planet in the Stanton System – a great distance from Humanity’s origins in the Sol System. The four planets in the system are owned by megacorporations who each purchased a planet from the UEE and now govern their own region of space. They are: Hurston Dynamics, Crusader Industries, ArcCorp, and microTech. \n\n~mission(Location|Name) is the main commercial zone of the thriving city that is the heart of Hurston Dynamics corporate empire. From here, the tutorial will guide you to ~mission(Destination), the space station in orbit above the planet that can serve as your gateway to further exploration of the Stanton system.
Tutorial01_Lorville_JournalToken.tr: 目前，你身處於斯坦頓星系第一顆行星赫斯頓上的洛維爾——這裡距離人類起源的太陽系非常遙遠。該星系中的四顆行星皆由巨型企業擁有，這些企業分別從地球聯邦購買了行星，並治理著各自的太空區域。他們分別是：赫斯頓動力、十字軍工業、弧光集團以及微科。

Tutorial01_NewBab_JournalToken.en: Currently, you are in New Babbage, on microTech, the fourth planet in the Stanton System – a great distance from Humanity’s origins in the Sol System. The four planets in the system are owned by megacorporations who each purchased a planet from the UEE and now govern their own region of space. They are: Hurston Dynamics, Crusader Industries, ArcCorp, and microTech. \n\n~mission(Location|Name) is a luxurious domed city that serves as the corporate headquarters to microTech, the leading computer and software developer in the Empire best known for making the mobiGlas. From here, the tutorial will guide you to ~mission(Destination), the space station in orbit above the planet that can serve as your gateway to further exploration of the Stanton system.
Tutorial01_NewBab_JournalToken.tr: 目前，你身處於斯坦頓星系第四顆行星「微科星」上的新巴貝奇——這裡距離人類起源的太陽系非常遙遠。該星系中的四顆行星均由巨型企業擁有，這些企業各自從地球聯合帝國（UEE）購得了行星，並治理著自己的太空區域。這些企業分別是：赫斯頓動力、十字軍工業、弧光集團以及微科。

Tutorial01_Orison_JournalToken.en: Currently, you are in Orison, above Crusader, the second planet in the Stanton System – a great distance from Humanity’s origins in the Sol System. The four planets in the system are owned by megacorporations who each purchased a planet from the UEE and now govern their own region of space. They are: Hurston Dynamics, Crusader Industries, ArcCorp, and microTech. \n\n~mission(Location|Name) is the main platform of the floating city that perches high in the clouds above the surface of Crusader. From here, the tutorial will guide you to ~mission(Destination), the space station in orbit above the planet that can serve as your gateway to further exploration of the Stanton system.
Tutorial01_Orison_JournalToken.tr: 目前，你位於斯坦頓星系第二顆行星「十字軍」上方的奧里森——這裡距離人類起源的太陽系非常遙遠。該星系中的四顆行星皆由巨型企業擁有，這些企業分別從地球聯合帝國（UEE）購得了行星，並治理著各自的太空區域。他們分別是：赫斯頓動力、十字軍工業、弧光集團以及微科。

Industrial_Hint_Interstellar.en: These ores can be mined on the surface of planets or moons in different solar systems and then delivered to the requested location.
Industrial_Hint_Interstellar.tr: 這些礦石可以在不同星系的行星或衛星表面進行採礦，並運送至指定地點。
